LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LULUVISE INC., LULUVISE LTD, AND ALEXANDRA CHONG'S MOTIONS TO STRIKE COMPLAINT UNDER CCP 425.16 AND FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED, IN PART, AS TO THE ANTI-SLAPP MOTION PERTAINING TO DEFENDANTS LULUVISE, INC. AND LULUVISE LIMITED. ON NOVEMBER 26, 2013, PLAINTIFF FILED A STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANTS' ANTI-SLAPP MOTION. (STMT. NON-OPP., P. 1:26 - 2:3.) THE ANTI-SLAPP MOTION AND MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AS TO DEFENDANT CHONG ARE OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT IN LIGHT OF THE RULING ON DEFENDANT CHONG'S MOTION TO QUASH, WHICH WAS ALSO UNOPPOSED BY PLAINTIFF. OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT AS THE MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AS TO DEFENDANTS LULUVISE, INC. AND LULUVISE LIMITED IN LIGHT OF THE RULING GRANTING THEIR UNOPPOSED ANTI-SLAPP MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT FACEBOOK, INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT IN LIGHT OF THE RULING ON FACEBOOK, INC.'S UNOPPOSED ANTI-SLAPP MOTION. THIS MOTION WAS FILED AS AN ALTERNATIVE IN THE ANTI-SLAPP MOTION WAS DENIED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motions And Motions To Strike Complaint Under Ccp 425.16 And For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LULUVISE INC., LULUVISE LTD, and ALEXANDRA CHONG'S Motions To Strike Complaint Under CCP 425.16 And For Judgment On The Pleadings IS Granted, in part, as to the anti-SLAPP motion pertaining to Defendants Luluvise, Inc. and Luluvise Limited. On November 26, 2013, Plaintiff filed a Statement of Non-Opposition to Defendants' anti-SLAPP motion. (Stmt. Non-Opp., p. 1:26 - 2:3.) The anti-SLAPP motion and motion for judgment on the pleadings as to Defendant Chong are off calendar as moot in light of the ruling on Defendant Chong's motion to quash, which was also unopposed by Plaintiff. Off calendar as moot as the motion for judgment on the pleadings as to Defendants Luluvise, Inc. and Luluvise Limited in light of the ruling granting their unopposed anti-SLAPP motion. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FACEBOOK, INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Off calendar as moot in light of the ruling on Facebook, Inc.'s unopposed anti-SLAPP motion. This motion was filed as an alternative in the anti-SLAPP motion was denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ALEXANDRA CHONG'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS Granted. On November 26, 2013, Plaintiff filed a Statement of Non-Opposition to Defendant Chong's motion to quash service of summons. (Stmt. Non-Opp., p. 1:26 - 2:3.) Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
